title: . Appeal from certification election orders. Any party to an election may appeal the order or result
content:
. Appeal from certification election orders. Any party to an election may appeal the order or results 
of the election as determined by the Med-Arbiter directly to the Secretary of Labor and Employment on the 
ground that the rules and regulations or parts thereof established by the Secretary of Labor and Employment 
for the conduct of the election have been violated. Such appeal shall be decided within fifteen (15) calendar 
days. (As amended by Section 25, Republic Act No. 6715, March 21, 1989) 
Title VII-A 
GRIEVANCE MACHINERY AND VOLUNTARY ARBITRATION
